payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a beige-tan speckled stone or laminate tabletop/countertop with a polished sheen and a rounded front edge; surface fills most of the crop and shows a small crumpled paper/foil object near the center; estimated distance from camera ~0.7 m.
